title: K-200 Nav/GNC Interface Control Document
text:
# K-200 Nav/GNC Interface Control Document

Document number: MD-DOC-417-B. Revision: B. Type: ICD. Author: Sam Dreher. Created: 2024-09-11. Last modified: 2025-04-25. Status: Released.

This document defines the requirements, interfaces, and verification approach for the Nav/GNC subsystem of the Kestrel K-200. Referenced parts: P-1048, P-1125, P-1163, P-1138.
